finding.title: Valid Post-Loss Blocker Override as Model Resumes CALL Intent
finding.suggested_action: Monitor the current CALL pre-positioning. Validate that the readiness suppression gaps ('Price persistence', 'Acceleration active') structurally resolve before execution, or that readiness is vetoed if price action fails to manifest the expected structural move.
finding.summary: Stable transition and disciplinary logic override are validated at tick 271. Following the brief logical switch to PUT and subsequent disengagement, the intent engine returned to PREPARE_CALL. Model diagnostics correctly recognized 'new extreme beyond prior episode' and 'cleared prior attempt extreme' as materiel new evidence to override the stale 'No genuinely new evidence' lock from the 12:36 PM loss. Entry is currently appropriately blocked by active playbook gaps for Price persistence and Acceleration.
evidence: Recent PUT episode (tick 251-266) was disengaged. Market Brain shifted back to CALL (69%) by 1:59 PM (Tick 270 Journal).
Intent at tick 271 (2:00 PM) is PREPARE_CALL, readiness 69, on contract 755C.
Readiness is suppressed below threshold 80 by Gaps: 'Current leg agrees', 'Price persistence', 'Acceleration active'.

Post-loss re-entry discipline (from 12:36 PM loss) is actively evaluated. Reentry diagnostics explicitly validate override condition based on 'new extreme beyond prior episode' and 'cleared prior attempt extreme' evidence, resulting in override: null.
System appropriately disengages the previous 'No genuinely new evidence' blocker, relying on current playbook gaps to prevent premature execution.
